metadata.description: Write blog posts and social media content that sounds human — in English, Vietnamese, or mixed. Now with visual diagram generation and Reddit support. Adaptive feedback learning builds a voice profile over time. Includes skill-gate hooks to enforce config reads before drafting.

plugins.name: dev-blog-writer
plugins.description: Write blog posts and social media content that sounds human — in English, Vietnamese, or mixed. Includes visual diagram generation (Mermaid), adaptive feedback learning, voice profile system, anti-AI-voice guidelines, MCP publishing, Reddit platform strategy, and skill-gate enforcement hooks.
